name: 26_Mushroom_Classification_RandomForest_Mushroom_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uainishaji uyoga kwa kutumia mfano wa Random Forest kwenye seti ya data ya UCI Mushroom. Pakia seti ya data katika faili `src/data_loader.py`. Hakikisha kwamba uhandisi wa vipengele, ikiwa ni pamoja na usimbaji wa vipengele na uteuzi wa vipengele, na utunzaji wa data inayokosekana unakamilishwa katika `src/data_loader.py` kabla ya kufundisha mfano. Fundisha Random Forest classifier kwenye seti ya data iliyosindikwa katika `src/train.py`. Hifadhi matokeo ya uainishaji `results/classification_results.txt`. Onyesha na hifadhi umuhimu wa vipengele kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`, kuhakikisha kwamba uonyeshaji unaonyesha wazi vipengele vyenye ushawishi mkubwa zaidi. Unda ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa mfano. Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kutoa muhtasari wa utendaji wa mfano na kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiliana na matokeo ya uainishaji. Mfumo unapaswa kusimamia mwanzo na mwisho wa uonyeshaji wa Streamlit ipasavyo.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Mushroom" inapakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.
Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na usimbaji wa vipengele na uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inayokosekana inashughulikiwa ili kuhakikisha seti ya data ni safi kabla ya kufundisha katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Random Forest classifier inafundishwa kwenye seti ya data iliyosindikwa katika `src/train.py`.
Umuhimu wa vipengele unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa mfano.

preferences.criteria: Uonyeshaji wa umuhimu wa vipengele unapaswa kuonyesha wazi vipengele vyenye ushawishi mkubwa zaidi, na kufanya iwe rahisi kufasiri.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kutoa muhtasari wa utendaji wa mfano na kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiliana na matokeo ya uainishaji.
Mfumo unapaswa kusimamia mwanzo na mwisho wa uonyeshaji wa Streamlit ipasavyo.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "UCI Mushroom" inapakiwa katika faili `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the UCI Mushroom dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no import of pandas, no file reading (e.g., `pd.read_csv`), no reference to any actual UCI Mushroom dataset file, and no real data processing. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings and returns fake placeholder data.

judge_stats.criteria: Uhandisi wa vipengele unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na usimbaji wa vipengele na uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual feature engineering. It contains only a placeholder `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` function returning a static list. There is no real dataset loading, no feature encoding (e.g., LabelEncoder, OneHotEncoder), and no feature selection logic whatsoever. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inayokosekana inashughulikiwa ili kuhakikisha seti ya data ni safi kabla ya kufundisha katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual data loading, and there is absolutely no missing data handling logic (e.g., no use of `dropna()`, `fillna()`, imputation strategies, or any similar techniques). The file is a minimal semantic placeholder that only lists requirement criteria as strings but does not implement them. No actual UCI Mushroom dataset is loaded, and no missing data handling is performed.

judge_stats.criteria: Random Forest classifier inafundishwa kwenye seti ya data iliyosindikwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not implement a Random Forest classifier. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation" with a dummy `train()` function that simply sums numbers in a loop (`score += step`), with no actual machine learning code. There is no import of `sklearn` or any ML library, no dataset loading, no `RandomForestClassifier` instantiation, no model fitting, and no real training on any dataset. The `save_expected_artifacts()` function merely creates placeholder text files (including writing plain text into a `.png` file), which are not genuine model outputs.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/classification_results.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — ambayo ni thamani ya mfano tu (placeholder) na si matokeo halisi ya uainishaji. Matokeo ya kweli ya uainishaji (kama vile accuracy, precision, recall, confusion matrix, au ripoti ya classification) hayakuhifadhiwa katika faili hiyo. Hii inaonyesha kwamba msimbo uliandika thamani ya muda badala ya matokeo halisi ya mfano wa Random Forest.

judge_stats.criteria: Umuhimu wa vipengele unaonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/feature_importance.png` exists in the project structure at the expected path (`results\figures\feature_importance.png`), as confirmed by the workspace tree. The image file was generated and saved to the correct location. The error shown in the content reading is a media type mismatch issue with the image reading tool (it tried to read the PNG as JPEG), not an indication that the file is missing or was not created. The file's presence in the directory structure confirms that feature importance was computed and saved as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa mfano.

Instead, it contains only a minimal semantic stub that defines requirement criteria strings and a `main()` function returning a dictionary — there is no `import streamlit`, no `st.` calls, no interactive web page, no display of classification results or model performance. The file is essentially a placeholder that describes the requirement rather than implementing it.
